programme.title: Alien Endgame
programme.desc: In 2021, a Pentagon report revealed UFO incidents and threats.For decades, the US government denied such reports.Now former soldiers reveal the behind-the-scenes of the conspiracy.

programme.title: Kobieta na krańcu świata
programme.desc: Martyna goes to Saint Petersburg, where she will meet Larisa Renar, who runs the Academy of Private Life.Women can find answers to all their questions about women's and men's issues there.Over 150,000 students have already completed courses conducted by Larisa - not only from Russia, but also from China, England, the United Arab Emirates, Bulgaria and Turkey.The heroine of the episode completed her MBA;is a psychologist, motivational trainer, and author of eight guides for women.For Russian women, whose salary is 1/3 less than men's, marriage has not only a romantic aspect, but also a business one.Hence the popularity of Larissa Academy.

programme.title: Kobieta na krańcu świata
programme.desc: Martyna Wojciechowska will visit Florida, where Maja Kazawiedź lives - a woman who escaped from a war-torn country - and Winter the dolphin.At Clearwater Marine Aquarium, the fates of man and animal intertwine.The heroine of the episode comes from Bosnia.She was fifteen years old when armed conflict broke out in the former Yugoslavia in 1992.Winter, in turn, as a 2-month-old baby, became entangled in the nets.Both of them came close to death, but survived thanks to their extraordinary determination and exceptional strength of character.Today they support others.Their story helped Martyna Wojciechowska in her own struggles with adversity.

programme.title: Kobieta na krańcu świata
programme.desc: 90% of Koreans use the Internet, almost all of them do it every day.There they follow vloggers who play online games, or muk-bang, i.e. people eating in front of the camera.Online users also adopt virtual children or see the world from a cat's perspective.However, greater activity on the Internet is related to the real, deepening loneliness of Koreans.The heroine of the episode will be BJ Levi, who reports her life on the Internet - she is Muk-bang and she makes money from it.In Korean, the word "family" means people who eat together.It is generally accepted that no one should eat a meal alone.On the other hand, nowadays more and more people live away from their families, so BJe provide them with company.The best of them can earn up to $9-10,000 a month, which is two or three times more than corporate employees.The most popular ones gain the status of celebrities.

programme.title: Alaskan Killer Bigfoot
programme.desc: Seventy years ago, Nantinaq forced the inhabitants to flee Portlock, Alaska.A team of daredevils arrives at an abandoned fishing village.What is a 40-day stay in a dangerous wilderness?

programme.title: Alaskan Killer Bigfoot
programme.desc: Seventy years ago, Nantinaq forced the inhabitants to flee Portlock, Alaska.A team of daredevils arrives at an abandoned fishing village.What is a 40-day stay in a dangerous wilderness?

programme.title: Niezwykłe Stany Prokopa
programme.desc: Horror is currently one of the most profitable genres in literature and film.Novels such as "Carrie", "Salem's Salem" and "The Shining" are considered horror classics.Their author, Stephen King, sets most of his stories in the quiet corners of Maine.Marcin Prokop visits King's hometown to understand how the environment in which the writer grew up influenced his extraordinary ability to create terrifying stories.These places are characterized by beautiful nature and peace, which attracts tourists away from the hustle and bustle of the city, creating an image of an American idyll.Marcin wants to discover what in this setting could have inspired King to write and whether the town of Derry, famous for his works, really exists under a different name.

programme.title: Niezwykłe Stany Prokopa
programme.desc: Country music is a key part of American culture.Thanks to contemporary artists such as Taylor Swift and Beyonce, the genre is attracting new generations of listeners.During his visit to Nashville, Marcin Prokop tries to understand what makes country more than just music.He meets with the artists' agent, visits an independent music studio where he observes a recording session, and talks to the curator of the legendary Ryman Auditorium.He also discovers a unique Polish exhibit in a private automotive museum.During his journey, he meets Tomek Wosiak, an emigrant from Gdynia, a renowned chef and manager of popular restaurants in the USA, who cooperates with the biggest stars.

programme.title: Bahamas Life 3
programme.desc: The Bahamas is a dream destination for an unforgettable vacation.The program's heroes, with the help of local real estate agents, set out to look for a house in a paradise setting.They choose an island and a property.

programme.title: Bahamas Life 3
programme.desc: The Bahamas is a dream destination for an unforgettable vacation.The program's heroes, with the help of local real estate agents, set out to look for a house in a paradise setting.They choose an island and a property.

programme.title: Bahamas Life 4
programme.desc: The Bahamas is a perfect place for an unforgettable and sunny vacation.However, waking up in paradise conditions can be an everyday occurrence.Real estate agents help program participants find a home.

programme.title: Bahamas Life 4
programme.desc: The Bahamas is a perfect place for an unforgettable and sunny vacation.However, waking up in paradise conditions can be an everyday occurrence.Real estate agents help program participants find a home.

programme.title: Baggage Battles 2
programme.desc: Every year, passengers traveling around the world lose millions of pieces of luggage.Many of them do not come forward to collect their lost items.Smart Billy Leroy, self-confident Mark Meyer and eccentric husband and wife Laurence and Sally Martin turned lost suitcases into a source of profit.Each of them visits auctions where unclaimed goods, items seized by the police or left at airports are auctioned.Relying on experience and intuition, they try to gain possession of the treasures hidden in the bags.It turns out that they can earn thousands of dollars in this not very complicated way.

programme.title: Baggage Battles 2
programme.desc: Every year, passengers traveling around the world lose millions of pieces of luggage.Many of them do not come forward to collect their lost items.Smart Billy Leroy, self-confident Mark Meyer and eccentric husband and wife Laurence and Sally Martin turned lost suitcases into a source of profit.Each of them visits auctions where unclaimed goods, items seized by the police or left at airports are auctioned.Relying on experience and intuition, they try to gain possession of the treasures hidden in the bags.It turns out that they can earn thousands of dollars in this not very complicated way.

programme.title: Baggage Battles 2
programme.desc: Every year, passengers traveling around the world lose millions of pieces of luggage.Many of them do not come forward to collect their lost items.Smart Billy Leroy, self-confident Mark Meyer and eccentric husband and wife Laurence and Sally Martin turned lost suitcases into a source of profit.Each of them visits auctions where unclaimed goods, items seized by the police or left at airports are auctioned.Relying on experience and intuition, they try to gain possession of the treasures hidden in the bags.It turns out that they can earn thousands of dollars in this not very complicated way.

programme.title: Baggage Battles 2
programme.desc: Every year, passengers traveling around the world lose millions of pieces of luggage.Many of them do not come forward to collect their lost items.Smart Billy Leroy, self-confident Mark Meyer and eccentric husband and wife Laurence and Sally Martin turned lost suitcases into a source of profit.Each of them visits auctions where unclaimed goods, items seized by the police or left at airports are auctioned.Relying on experience and intuition, they try to gain possession of the treasures hidden in the bags.It turns out that they can earn thousands of dollars in this not very complicated way.

programme.title: Tu jest pięknie
programme.desc: Dorota Szelągowska will visit unique places in Poland, the existence of which only insiders often know.The host will prove that it is never too late to fulfill your childhood dream and live in a tree house, at least for a while.For those who value greater comfort, he will show luxurious interiors created, among others, by:in an old cotton fabric factory.Viewers will also meet the owners of these charming places, who will tell their stories and reveal how they managed to implement their unique plans and projects.Many of them abandoned life in big cities to be able to do what they love most, i.e. interior design and running unique guesthouses.Dorota Szelągowska will look into every nook and cranny of these original objects, reveal interior design ideas to the viewers and prove that there are many wonderful places in Poland that are truly beautiful. Dorota Szelągowska visits Pabianice.Thanks to many years of revitalization works, the former building of a cotton fabric factory now houses the "Fabryka Wełny" hotel.The presenter will assess the effect of the designers' efforts, who had to combine modern design with elements reflecting the past of this place.At the same time, they could not forget about comfortable conditions for guests.Then Dorota Szelągowska will try the dishes served in the hotel restaurant and talk to the musicians working there.

programme.title: Tu jest pięknie
programme.desc: Dorota Szelągowska discovers the delightful corners of Poland.It shows places whose existence was previously known only to the initiated.It proves that you don't have to leave the country to reach paradise.

programme.title: Tu jest pięknie
programme.desc: Dorota Szelągowska discovers the delightful corners of Poland.It shows places whose existence was previously known only to the initiated.It proves that you don't have to leave the country to reach paradise.

programme.title: Tu jest pięknie
programme.desc: Dorota Szelągowska discovers the delightful corners of Poland.It shows places whose existence was previously known only to the initiated.It proves that you don't have to leave the country to reach paradise.

programme.title: Kamperem przez świat
programme.desc: The program will show the fate of three teams that set off around the world in campers.The next episodes are a record of their life on the road - they have no plan or any restrictions.

programme.title: Szokujące potrawy
programme.desc: Jarek Nowak is looking for shocking dishes in Peru.He visits Iquitos - a city located on the Amazon River, to which no land route leads.Looking for extreme taste sensations, he reaches the market.There you can buy products straight from the jungle, such as turtles, crocodiles, fish and worms.Traders also sell magical herbs and unusual potions that can cure various ailments.Later, the host pays a visit to a tribe that eats monkeys, turtles, eggs, intestines with their contents, and spicy Karachama fish soup.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: Niezwykłe Stany Prokopa
programme.desc: The fun never stops in New Orleans.This dancing city is, above all, the cradle of jazz - music resounds here from morning to evening, creating an amazing atmosphere, and artists from all over the world hang out in cafes and pubs.Colorful buildings and narrow streets give the city a unique character and thus become an attractive setting for film productions.There is also no shortage of different colors on Frenchmen Street, where Marcin can try on an original suit.Also expect a bit of poetry on the way to Miami!However, before we get there, Marcin will have to find his black, mechanical horse...

programme.title: Niezwykłe Stany Prokopa
programme.desc: Marcin Prokop goes on a trip to the east coast of the United States.He will visit, among others:Ohio, Cleveland, New York, the White House will watch.

programme.title: Niezwykłe Stany Prokopa
programme.desc: Marcin Prokop goes on a trip to the east coast of the United States.He will visit, among others:Ohio, Cleveland, New York, the White House will watch.

programme.title: Niezwykłe Stany Prokopa
programme.desc: Marcin Prokop goes on a trip to the east coast of the United States.He will visit, among others:Ohio, Cleveland, New York, the White House will watch.

programme.title: Tajemnice wraków Bałtyku
programme.desc: A team of divers led by Tomek Stachura is preparing for the next expeditions.Meanwhile, Tomek receives a call from Elin Linde, granddaughter of the last captain of the Mount Vernon.The unit sank in circumstances that have not yet been explained.The woman and her mother have been trying to discover the mystery of Captain Gosta Rudnert's death for many years.After sixty years, Sweden declassifies some documents.It turns out that the wreck is located near the Polish coast.Elin, who dives herself and has searched for the wreck several times on her own, finally wants to see the captain's bridge where her grandfather could have died, as well as the documents that the Polish authorities have.

programme.title: Tajemnice wraków Bałtyku
programme.desc: The episode deals with the mystery of the notorious Bremerhaven ship.Apparently it "brings bad luck" because it was built and launched in Belfast, which is where the famous Titanic was.It brought death and was also a forced labor camp located in Police.Many questions about those times are answered by people who were directly affected by the events at Bremerhaven - former prisoners and their families, including:grandmother of Łukasz Piórewicz, a diver from Tomek Stachura's team.The man wants to see the place from which his great-grandfather returned in terrible condition.

programme.title: Alaskan Killer Bigfoot
programme.desc: Seventy years ago, Nantinaq forced the inhabitants to flee Portlock, Alaska.A team of daredevils arrives at an abandoned fishing village.What is a 40-day stay in a dangerous wilderness?

programme.title: Alaskan Killer Bigfoot
programme.desc: Seventy years ago, Nantinaq forced the inhabitants to flee Portlock, Alaska.A team of daredevils arrives at an abandoned fishing village.What is a 40-day stay in a dangerous wilderness?

programme.title: Naked and Afraid 7
programme.desc: Two unknown people, a woman and a man, are left in a lonely place with difficult climatic conditions.They must spend 21 days there without food, water or clothing.They can only take one item with them.Operators show how people relying on their own company learn to cooperate and make key decisions together.Viewers will see that appropriate knowledge and skills can be very useful in extreme moments and even determine survival.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL 3
programme.desc: Thirteen experienced survival experts try to survive for 40 days in extreme conditions in the African Ga-Selati River basin.They will certainly face predators.

programme.title: Kobieta na krańcu świata
programme.desc: Martyna Wojciechowska visits Tanzania.The traveler will look at the tradition according to which a woman can marry another woman.However, this is not related to homosexuality, which is banned in this country.Sexual acts between people of the same sex are punishable by imprisonment.The first case of a relationship between two women in Tanzania was recorded in 1927.For the Kuria tribe, children, especially boys, are the most valuable.So when a woman is, for example, infertile, she must marry another woman to give her children.As in the case of male-female relationships, the partner is paid in cows.Depending on the amount of wealth owned, there may be several wives.Relationships between women constitute 10-15% of all marriages.They live together, do housework and raise children together.

programme.title: Kobieta na krańcu świata
programme.desc: The eighth season is a special time in Martyna Wojciechowska's life.Due to numerous adversities, she was unable to complete the full series of the program.It may not have been broadcast either.However, the traveler managed to visit five extraordinary women.She had a special bond with Maja, who lives in Florida.In Russia, thanks to Larisa Renar, Martyna Wojciechowska learned the secret of sex appeal.She visited women and their wives in picturesque Tanzania.However, in South Korea, thanks to BJ Levi, almost an episode from the past was created.The traveler also touched upon the difficult issue of trafficking in women and sexual exploitation of minors.Back then, the heroine of the report was Iana Matei from Romania, for whom the lives of children became more important than her own.In addition, she will also visit Kabula, an albino girl, to check how she is doing in her new school and whether she is fulfilling her dreams.

programme.title: Kobieta na krańcu świata
programme.desc: Martyna Wojciechowska visits Malaysia.There he meets with members of the Badjao community, which the rest of the world has not yet heard of.According to legends, their ancestors had gills.Currently, these people can stay underwater for several minutes on one breath and dive to a depth of 20-30 meters without any specialized equipment.The Badjao live on boats or in houses built on stilts.They spend their whole lives there, so when they come ashore, they get land sickness.Their children learn to swim before they can even walk.The traveler visits a local healer, Djirajniha, who enjoys great trust and respect.Thanks to it, Martyna Wojciechowska can get to know the extraordinary world of Badjao.

programme.title: Kamperem przez świat
programme.desc: The program will show the fate of three teams that set off around the world in campers.The next episodes are a record of their life on the road - they have no plan or any restrictions.

programme.title: Szokujące potrawy
programme.desc: Jarek Nowak is looking for shocking dishes in Peru.He visits Iquitos - a city located on the Amazon River, to which no land route leads.Looking for extreme taste sensations, he reaches the market.There you can buy products straight from the jungle, such as turtles, crocodiles, fish and worms.Traders also sell magical herbs and unusual potions that can cure various ailments.Later, the host pays a visit to a tribe that eats monkeys, turtles, eggs, intestines with their contents, and spicy Karachama fish soup.

programme.title: Tajemnice wraków Bałtyku
programme.desc: A team of divers led by Tomek Stachura is preparing for the next expeditions.Meanwhile, Tomek receives a call from Elin Linde, granddaughter of the last captain of the Mount Vernon.The unit sank in circumstances that have not yet been explained.The woman and her mother have been trying to discover the mystery of Captain Gosta Rudnert's death for many years.After sixty years, Sweden declassifies some documents.It turns out that the wreck is located near the Polish coast.Elin, who dives herself and has searched for the wreck several times on her own, finally wants to see the captain's bridge where her grandfather could have died, as well as the documents that the Polish authorities have.

programme.title: Tajemnice wraków Bałtyku
programme.desc: The episode deals with the mystery of the notorious Bremerhaven ship.Apparently it "brings bad luck" because it was built and launched in Belfast, which is where the famous Titanic was.It brought death and was also a forced labor camp located in Police.Many questions about those times are answered by people who were directly affected by the events at Bremerhaven - former prisoners and their families, including:grandmother of Łukasz Piórewicz, a diver from Tomek Stachura's team.The man wants to see the place from which his great-grandfather returned in terrible condition.

programme.title: Man v Food 2
programme.desc: Adam sets off on a journey across the United States to take part in subsequent rounds of timed eating competitions.Adam will take on Badass Burrito in Las Vegas and a 106-centimetre pizza in San Antonio.

programme.title: Saved by the Barn
programme.desc: Dan McKernan left his previous life and moved to a house in the countryside.He established an animal reserve there on his family farm.The program includes everyday life in a rural settlement among animals.

programme.title: Saved by the Barn
programme.desc: Dan McKernan left his previous life and moved to a house in the countryside.He established an animal reserve there on his family farm.The program includes everyday life in a rural settlement among animals.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits various cities around the world.In each of them, he presents dishes typical of a given place.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits various cities around the world.In each of them, he presents dishes typical of a given place.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits various cities around the world.In each of them, he presents dishes typical of a given place.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits various cities around the world.In each of them, he presents dishes typical of a given place.

programme.title: Niezwykłe Stany Prokopa
programme.desc: Marcin Prokop will go on a spontaneous journey across America in a program full of humor.During his journey across the United States, which lasts over a month, the journalist will cover thousands of kilometers.Viewers will have the opportunity to see the alleys of the largest Chinese district in the US, find themselves behind the walls of the most famous prison, Alcatraz, and look out the window of the tallest skyscraper in San Francisco.The host will stop at the world's largest stop for giant trucks, visit a hippie town and visit a unique restaurant connected to a laundry.The audience will be able to feast their eyes on amazing landscapes, unique national parks and wonderful waterfalls.

programme.title: Niezwykłe Stany Prokopa
programme.desc: Marcin Prokop will go on a spontaneous journey across America in a program full of humor.During his journey across the United States, which lasts over a month, the journalist will cover thousands of kilometers.Viewers will have the opportunity to see the alleys of the largest Chinese district in the US, find themselves behind the walls of the most famous prison, Alcatraz, and look out the window of the tallest skyscraper in San Francisco.The host will stop at the world's largest stop for giant trucks, visit a hippie town and visit a unique restaurant connected to a laundry.The audience will be able to feast their eyes on amazing landscapes, unique national parks and wonderful waterfalls.

programme.title: Niezwykłe Stany Prokopa
programme.desc: Marcin Prokop will go on a spontaneous journey across America in a program full of humor.During his journey across the United States, which lasts over a month, the journalist will cover thousands of kilometers.Viewers will have the opportunity to see the alleys of the largest Chinese district in the US, find themselves behind the walls of the most famous prison, Alcatraz, and look out the window of the tallest skyscraper in San Francisco.The host will stop at the world's largest stop for giant trucks, visit a hippie town and visit a unique restaurant connected to a laundry.The audience will be able to feast their eyes on amazing landscapes, unique national parks and wonderful waterfalls In the final episode, the creators of the program will visit Sioux Falls, the largest city in the state of South Dakota, whose most popular attraction are waterfalls.Marcin Prokop will assess whether it is worth going there.Then he will go to a creepy town, inspired by the Westworld series, inhabited by realistic-looking mannequins.The last point of Marcin Prokop's journey is Chicago.There he will visit the Polish district, see a fountain with many faces, and take a look at the largest bean in the world - Cloud Gate.In this episode, viewers will have the opportunity to follow the host's mishaps and find out what happened behind the scenes of the program.

programme.title: Niezwykłe Stany Prokopa
programme.desc: Marcin Prokop sets off on another journey around the United States.Together with cameraman Bebek, he will lie on the beaches in Miami, see historic plantations in Georgia and party in the clubs of New Orleans.

programme.title: Europa filmowa
programme.desc: Actor Rafał Zawierucha travels across Europe - from London and Paris to Rome and Berlin - discovering the secrets of the most popular Hollywood film productions.

programme.title: Europa filmowa
programme.desc: Actor Rafał Zawierucha travels across Europe - from London and Paris to Rome and Berlin - discovering the secrets of the most popular Hollywood film productions.

programme.title: Ciężarówką przez Stany
programme.desc: Dawid Andres will once again take advantage of the opportunity and combine delivering goods with exploring American nature, architecture and culture.With him, viewers will visit, among others:Atlanta and check out the Daytona track.

programme.title: Ciężarówką przez Stany
programme.desc: Dawid Andres will once again take advantage of the opportunity and combine delivering goods with exploring American nature, architecture and culture.With him, viewers will visit, among others:Atlanta and check out the Daytona track.

programme.desc: Adam sets off on a journey across the United States to take part in subsequent rounds of timed eating competitions.Adam will take on Badass Burrito in Las Vegas and a 106-centimetre pizza in San Antonio.

programme.desc: Adam sets off on a journey across the United States to take part in subsequent rounds of timed eating competitions.Adam will take on Badass Burrito in Las Vegas and a 106-centimetre pizza in San Antonio.

programme.desc: Two unknown people, a woman and a man, are left in a lonely place with difficult climatic conditions.They must spend 21 days there without food, water or clothing.They can only take one item with them.The operators show how daredevils, relying on their own company, learn to cooperate and make key decisions together.Viewers will see that appropriate knowledge and skills can be very useful in extreme moments and even determine survival.
